What's inside

5 days of fun, skill-building activities 🖍️

Day 1 🔤

Alphabet Tracing

Upper & lowercase letter formation with step-by-step stroke guides.

Day 2 🔢

Number Writing

Trace and practice numbers 1–3 with plenty of guided repetition.

Day 3 🐶

Counting Practice

Count adorable puppies and circle the right number answer.

Day 4 🎨

Color by Number

A cute bear coloring sheet that reinforces number recognition.

Day 5 ✂️

Fine Motor Practice

Trace zigzag lines and wavy paths to build pencil control & scissor skills.

Bonus ⭐

Dot Painting & More

A star dot-painting sheet and a cut-out counting activity as extras.

1

4

5 minutes of learning

Watch your little one build skills — and love every minute.
